dialogues: This graph goes sideways, horizontal. Same idea, you just click for the length for the number of symbols instead of height.
Make a picture graph. Start with Liam. He read 35 books. Set the number of symbols for Liam.
Right. 7 symbols for 35 books. 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35. That's how you count by the scale to place the right number of symbols.
